settings.heading: Glass Trophies & Awards in India
settings.subheading: Elegant glass trophies and awards with deep engraving and printed accents — a clean, affordable alternative to crystal for corporate recognition and events. Made in Bangalore, delivered pan-India.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy makes glass trophies and awards with engraving and colour printing from around ₹400 — an elegant, more affordable alternative to optical crystal. Made in Bangalore, delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Clean elegance, sensible price
settings.text: Glass awards offer a clear, refined look for corporate recognition without the price of premium optical crystal. We engrave names, logos and citations, add coloured printing or metal stands, and finish each piece with polished edges. Ideal for mid-tier corporate awards, conference tokens and appreciation pieces ordered in volume.

settings.title: More affordable than crystal
settings.text: Premium feel at a friendlier price point.

settings.title: Printing & metal accents
settings.text: Colour printing and metal stands for variety.

settings.question: Glass vs crystal — what's the difference?
settings.answer: Optical crystal (K9) is clearer, heavier and more premium; glass is lighter and more affordable while still looking elegant. We can quote both.

settings.question: Can you engrave logos into the glass?
settings.answer: Yes — deep engraving and colour printing for logos, names and citations.

settings.question: Is there a minimum order?
settings.answer: No minimum; per-piece pricing improves from 25 units.

settings.heading: Need glass trophies for an event?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, quantity and date — we'll send designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
